reasoning: Today's ride will focus on improving your lactate clearance and aerobic base by targeting over-under intervals. Given your 25W drop from 5-min to 20-min power, you need to enhance your fatigue resistance, which will also prepare you for the sustained demands of the Alpine Loop climb. After the 10-day rest, we'll start with slightly reduced intensity to ease back into consistent training.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Complete 4 sets of 10 minutes: 5 minutes at 201-209W, followed by 5 minutes at 242-256W to simulate over-unders.

suggested_sets.name: Cooldown
suggested_sets.description: Easy spin to flush out lactic acid

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
